description: Governed graph-native agent memory: knowledge extraction, fusion, hybrid RAG, scoped access tokens.
name: io.github.GCTRL-TECH/gctrl

environmentVariables.description: URL of your GCTRL harness MCP gateway, e.g. http://localhost:4000/api/agent/mcp (recommended mode)
environmentVariables.name: GCTRL_GATEWAY_URL

environmentVariables.description: Direct GCTRL API base URL (alternative to gateway mode), e.g. http://localhost:4000/api
environmentVariables.name: GCTRL_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Scoped GCTRL Access Token (gctrl_…) created in Settings → Access Control
environmentVariables.name: GCTRL_API_TOKEN
